# Beyond the Listing Show — AI-Readable Brand Summary

## What It Is

Beyond the Listing Show is a real estate media and storytelling service that produces hosted YouTube episodes and content packages for real estate agents. Each production turns a listing, neighborhood, or agent story into a cinematic show episode paired with a full suite of social media content.

## Who It Serves

- Top-producing real estate agents
- Boutique brokerages and real estate teams
- Luxury and exclusive listing specialists
- Agents who want to differentiate with premium video content
- Real estate teams running structured marketing programs

## Markets Served

- **Central and Northern Virginia** — including the Washington D.C. metro area, NoVA suburbs, and surrounding counties
- **Greater Atlanta, Georgia** — including Atlanta metro and surrounding communities

## Services Offered

### Hosted YouTube Episodes
A 5-minute cinematic YouTube episode that tells the story of the listing, the neighborhood, and the agent. Each episode follows a structured format: intro, regional context, cinematic tour, agent interview, interior walkthrough, lifestyle highlights, drone overview, and outro.

### Social Media Clips and Reels
Short-form video content cut from the full episode for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and Facebook — ready to post and share.

### Drone and B-Roll Footage
Aerial and cinematic B-roll footage of the property and surrounding area.

### Branded Call-to-Action Assets
Custom branded graphics and video cards featuring agent contact details and property information.

## Why Agents Use It

- Win more listings by presenting a premium marketing plan
- Give sellers a shareable, brand-reinforcing experience
- Turn one production into weeks of social media content
- Build credibility with high-production video storytelling
- Support listing presentations with proof of premium marketing capabilities

## How It Works

1. Coordinate property, schedule, and logistics
2. Film a cinematic tour and agent interview on location
3. Produce the full episode and content package in post-production
4. Deliver final assets for agent use across YouTube, social media, and marketing

## Common Questions

**What is Beyond the Listing Show?**
A hosted YouTube series and real estate media production service that helps agents create premium listing content from a single on-location production.

**Who is this for?**
Real estate agents, listing agents, boutique brokerages, and teams in Central/Northern Virginia and Greater Atlanta who want to differentiate with cinematic video marketing.

**What markets do you serve?**
Central and Northern Virginia and Greater Atlanta, Georgia.

**How does this help real estate agents?**
It positions agents as premium, media-forward professionals — helping them win listings, impress sellers, and build an ongoing content library from each production.

**Can this support listing presentations and social media?**
Yes. Agents receive a full content package including a YouTube episode, social clips, drone footage, and branded assets that fuel presentations, social feeds, and outreach campaigns.

**How do I request more information?**
Fill out the contact form at https://beyondthelistingshow.com/#contact or email casting@beyondthelistingshow.com.

## Conversion Path

Primary call to action: Request More Info or Book a Call via the contact form at https://beyondthelistingshow.com/#contact
